title: schoenia ayersii
intro: Schoenia ayersii, also known as Poverty Weed, is a flowering plant species native to Western Australia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Schoenia ayersii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from skin irritations. Schoenia ayersii can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various forms.
